author: gb9t
content: Iter 133 result: net/tipc/tipc.md (TIPC Transparent Inter-Process Communication - socket.c ~4010 + core.c ~229 lines; per-cluster IPC with named services + sockaddr_tipc TIPC_SERVICE_ADDR/RANGE/SOCKET_ADDR + 4 socket types SOCK_RDM/SEQPACKET/STREAM/DGRAM + tipc_bind publish to name-table rb-tree per (type, lower, upper) + per-cluster-node auto-discovery via tipc_disc + per-link L2-Eth or UDP bearer + per-publish/withdraw events + topology server + TIPC_GROUP fanout + multicast + cluster-aware service-failover) + mm/numa-mempolicy.md (NUMA memory policy - mempolicy.c ~3948 lines; modes MPOL_DEFAULT/PREFERRED/BIND/INTERLEAVE/LOCAL/PREFERRED_MANY/WEIGHTED_INTERLEAVE + flags MPOL_F_STATIC_NODES/RELATIVE_NODES/NUMA_BALANCING + set_mempolicy(2) per-task + mbind(2) per-VMA-range + get_mempolicy(2) MPOL_F_NODE/MEMS_ALLOWED + MPOL_MF_MOVE/MOVE_ALL/STRICT migrate + per-task il_prev interleave-counter + huge_node THP-aware + alloc_pages_mpol policy_node + cpuset rebind on attach + numa_balancing PROT_NONE faults + numactl userspace + Documentation/admin-guide/mm/numa_memory_policy.rst). 216 Tier-3s total. Next iter: net/sctp/sctp.md (SCTP) + mm/swap-detail.md or pivot.
